summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of SwarmOS redesign. All 20 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows (Landing, Onboarding, Dashboard) working correctly. Stripe integration and OpenAI email generation verified.
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: Resend email sending not integrated - no actual emails sent
MOCKED: Gmail inbox reading is simulated
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup: 1 demo user, 5 leads, 1 campaign
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major redesign tested successfully. All features working: Landing page (navbar, hero, social proof, features, pricing, footer), Onboarding wizard (4 steps with progress bar, back button), Dashboard (sidebar nav, KPI cards, multiple views, upgrade to Stripe, logout). Backend tests cover: health, login, stats, leads CRUD, outreach, dashboard, meetings, automation, onboarding, AI email generation (OpenAI), Stripe checkout.

landing_page.navbar: SwarmOS logo, Login link, Start Free Trial CTA - all working
landing_page.hero_section: Heading, description, Start Free Trial and Book Demo buttons - all working
landing_page.feature_cards: 4 feature cards (Define ICP, AI emails, Automated outreach, Meetings booked) - visible
landing_page.pricing_section: Free ($0) and Pro ($99) plans with CTAs - working

onboarding_wizard.step_labels: Email, Target, Offer, Volume icons and labels - visible
onboarding_wizard.step_2_target: Input field, Continue button, Back button - working
onboarding_wizard.step_3_offer: Input field, Continue button, Back button - working
onboarding_wizard.step_4_volume: Input field, Launch AI System button, Back button - working
onboarding_wizard.submission: Creates user via POST /api/login, saves onboarding via POST /api/onboarding, redirects to /dashboard - working

dashboard.sidebar: SwarmOS logo, nav items (Dashboard, Outreach, Meetings, Analytics, Settings), Upgrade card, Logout button - all visible
dashboard.topbar: View title, welcome message with email, plan badge - working
dashboard.kpi_cards: Emails Sent, Replies, Meetings Booked, Total Leads - all visible with data-testid
dashboard.nav_switching: Clicking nav items switches views correctly - working
dashboard.analytics_view: Reply Rate, Conversion, Contacted KPIs - working
dashboard.logout_button: Clears localStorage and redirects to landing page - working

backend_apis.GET /api/stats: Returns stats object with leads, contacted, sent, replies, booked - working
backend_apis.POST /api/generate-email: Generates AI email using OpenAI - working
